_info: Raw API responses — overwritten on each new analysis

ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes
ISSEMENT : La nicotine cree une forte
grapie de remplacement de la nicotine
This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint flavour) centered on a white background with a faint radial gradient. Above the tin is a headline 'New to ZONNIC?' in navy blue and green, and below is 'Here's how it works...' with a green arrow. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, including an 18+ icon and bilingual risk text.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint flavour) centered on a white background with a faint radial gradient. Above the tin is a headline 'New to ZONNIC?' in navy blue and green, and below is 'Here's how it works...' with a green arrow. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, including an 18+ icon and bilingual risk text.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin), headline text top-center
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (headline), large (on tin)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): NO ⚠ MISSING FROM C!
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: green (on product tin)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: green
  Shape: circle (on product tin)
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white, subtle light grey gradient
  Gradient direction: radial (center outwards)
  Description: Solid white with a faint radial light grey gradient

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top (large banner), also on product tin
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom (full width)

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (headline/logo), regular sans-serif (body/regulatory)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: New to ZONNIC? Here's how it works...

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: accent (green used for 'how it works' and product tin details)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features a ZONNIC product tin (Mint flavour) centered on a white background with a subtle radial grey gradient. The ZONNIC logo is visible in navy blue, both in the headline and on the product tin, with sufficient clear space and proper font usage. Regulatory elements are correctly included: a bilingual nicotine warning at the top, an 18+ icon at the bottom left, and risk communication text at the bottom, all in the expected positions. The colour palette matches the Mint flavour, with navy blue and green used as accents. However, the circular halo that should be partially behind the C in the ZONNIC logo is missing from the headline and is only present as a solid green circle on the product tin (not a gradient as required for white backgrounds). For educational content, the logo and halo are recommended but not strictly required, so this is a warning rather than a critical failure. The image is largely compliant, but adding the C halo in a gradient form to the headline logo would improve brand consistency.

checks_performed.detail: Bilingual nicotine warning is present at the top of the image, meeting regulatory requirements.
18+ age restriction icon is visible at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image, as required.
ZONNIC logo is present in the headline and on the product tin.
Logo text is navy blue on a light background, which is correct.
The C halo is missing from the headline logo and is only present as a solid green circle on the product tin, not a gradient as required for white backgrounds.
Logo is not distorted, modified, or altered; proper arrangement and proportions are maintained.
Background is white with a subtle radial grey gradient, appropriate for educational content.
No full flavour gradient background is used; only a subtle radial grey gradient is present.
Content is educational and uses a white/grey background, which is correct.
Approved brand colours (navy blue, green, white) are used, matching the Mint flavour palette.
Santral sans-serif font is used for headline, logo, and regulatory text.
Subtle grey gradient is used at low opacity on white, matching guidelines for educational content.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
No issues with halo blending, flavour mismatch, or logo in shapes; all elements are compliant.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
violations.issue: The C halo is missing from the headline ZONNIC logo. For educational content, this is a warning, not a critical failure.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular halo behind the C in the headline ZONNIC logo for brand consistency.
violations.evidence: Logo in headline lacks the C halo.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo on the product tin is a solid green colour, not a gradient as required for white backgrounds. For educational content, this is a warning.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use a gradient halo (primary and secondary Mint colours) behind the C on white backgrounds.
violations.evidence: Product tin shows a solid green halo behind the C.
